text: 1 Careers and Digital Portfolio (AIDI 2002) Assignment #3 – Elevator Pitch Video (25% of Total Grade) Professor: Sam Plati The Ask: Part A: Create an Elevator Pitch Video – 15% Record a 30-second Elevator Pitch Part B: Elevator Pitch Video Critique (.doc or .docx) - 10% Critique – 8% i. Provide a written form of your elevator pitch ii. Identify the key sections of your Elevator Pitch iii. Explain the key message you are trying to convey in each section Next Steps – 2% i. Identify two (2) changes that you would make to your Elevator Pitch AI Use: Medium – Can use to brainstorm ideas, check for grammar and sentence structure Please post your Elevatore Pitch (any video format) and Elevator Pitch Critique (.doc or .docx) via assignments under Assignment #3 by March 27 th @ 11:59 p.m. 2 Rubric Question Exemplary ) Proficient Incomplete Needs Improvement Part A (15%) The elevator pitch was approximately 30 seconds and contained all relevant details. Elevator Pitch was approximately 30 seconds, with a few missing relevant details. Elevator Pitch was incomplete, with many relevant details missing Elevator Pitch was missing or incorrect Part B (10%) Elevator Pitch sections reviewed with detailed explanations Two (2) changes identified with detailed explanations Elevator Pitch sections reviewed with high-level explanations Two (2) changes identified with high- level explanations Elevator Pitch was incomplete, with many sections missing. Less than two (2) changes identified with limited explanations Elevator Pitch explanations are missing or incorrect. Changes are missing or incorrect.
